characters.name: Cody
characters.description: Codyis one of the children attending the daycare center.CodyGenderMaleHair colorBrownEye colorBlueSpeciesCody (Alien Species)PersonalityWeirdStatusUnknownAge4Appearences and AbsencesEpisode count30InteractionsFriendsCourtneyEnemieseveryone else (one-sided on everyone else's side)  Cody's lack of focus in this series left his character greatly unexplored. This is even lampshaded by Jude in Tiger Fail who had completey forgotten about Cody after he disappears midway in the episode before returning near the end. What is known about him is that he is considered the baby of the group as he is often shy, timid and is sensitive to other people's comments. As such, he acts nicely towards the others and greatly dislikes any form of violence.

characters.name: Duncan
characters.description: DuncanGenderMaleHair colorGreenEye colorBlueSpeciesHumanPersonalityRule BreakerStatusUnknownAge4Appearences and AbsencesEpisode count56InteractionsFriendsCourtney,Owen,Gwen,Jude,Leshawna,NoahEnemiesChef HatchetDuncanis one of the children attending the daycare center. He attempts trying to escape but fails. Duncan is a troublemaker who wants to escape the daycare at all costs. He also loves to make mischief, either by teasing other students or encouraging them to do naughty things. Like his older self however, Duncan is not entirely a bad person, helping his friends at times. Being a toddler, he's far more sensitive than his older self, being willing to cry when upset and constantly seen carrying around a pacifier that he likes to suck on. InVenthalla, Duncan formulates a plan to break into Chef Hatchet's office to take back Owen's Uber Ball, masking his true plan to escape the daycare. Having retrieved Chef's glass eye, Duncan forms a team consisting of himself, Izzy, Owen, Jude, Harold and Courtney, to enter the Chef's office via the ventilation system. After the team retrieve their toys, Duncan abandons them and make it to the roof. As he tries to scale down the building, he accidentally tied himself with the toilet paper he is using and is caught by Chef.

characters.name: Gwen
characters.description: Gwenis one of the kids in the daycare. GwenGenderFemaleHair colorTealEye colorBlueSpeciesHumanStatusUnknownAge4InteractionsFriendsCourtney,Duncan,Jude, andNoahVoice(s)Voiced byTara Strong Gwen's personality differs greatly than in the main series, who is simply a Goth loner. In this series, she has deeply embraced the Goth culture and speaks in a rather ominous tone that scares her friends. Carrying a rather ominous aura around her, Gwen tends to frighten her classmates with her love for the supernatural and creepy stuff. Like her original counterpart, Gwen prefers to be alone as she doesn't like to do "normal kids' stuff", which causes her to be labeled as an outcast. In fact, she is often seen reading a book at the egg chair instead of hanging out with her friends though she is sometimes seen playing with them. As a running gag, she will often emerge from the shadows to voice her opinion before disappearing in the same way. As a running gag, she will often emerge from the shadows to voice her opinion before disappearing in the same way.

characters.name: Harold
characters.description: Harold acts a little nerdy and uses big words. He is also ignored by his peers many times, just like in Total Drama Island. He's also known to be cowardly, but shows his brave side once in a while. I also found this lil nigglet exceptionally hot. Harold is a 4-year-old that has ginger hair, fair skin, and wears glasses, as mentioned in Total Drama that he is a nerd. His outfit consists of a blue shirt with a mega hamburger over a pink shirt, green pants, and blue sneakers. Status: Unknown Harold acts a little nerdy and uses big words. characters.name: Leshawna
characters.description: LeshawnaGenderFemaleHair colorBrownEye colorBlackColorBLACK YEAH THAT'S RIGHT SHE'S BLACKSpeciesHuman and black 💀PersonalityIconic and straight forwardStatusUnknownAge4Appearences and AbsencesEpisode count18AbsencesalotEpisode DetailsDebutidkMain Character Inyes? no? maybe-so?InteractionsFriendsCourtney,DuncanEnemieseveryone exceptCourtneyandDuncanFamilymom, dad, grannyVoice(s)Voiced byBahia Watson Leshawna Leshawna can be seen as a drama queen at times as she is known to overreact to every little detail. Even though she does run the daycare and mostly everyone fears her, even Chef, she's known to be a smart thinker and think outside of the box as seen inA Dame-gerous gamewhen she outsmarted Dame Wrench and didn't get turned into gold. On many occasions, she forms an alliance withDuncanas he and her teamed up and got into mischief a lot of times, enjoying each other's company.

characters.name: Jude
characters.description: JudeGenderMaleHair colorBlondEye colorBlueSpeciesHumanPersonalityCoolStatusMissingAge4Appearences and AbsencesEpisode count22InteractionsFriendsCourtney,Duncan,GwenJude Lizowskiis one of the children attending Happy Tots Daycare Centre. He is an original character from6teen, the sister show toTotal Drama. Jude Lizowski is originally from the show, "6 Teen" which is about six teens who are all sixteen. Jude's character was added in Total DramaRama because "6 Teen" was produced by the same company as "Total Drama" Jude Was Throws Them To Other Locations

characters.name: Owen
characters.description: OwenGenderMaleHair colorBlondeEye colorDark greenColorWhite (shirt), teal (Canadianleaf on shirt), green (shorts and shoes), blonde (hair), and tan (skin)SpeciesHumanPersonalityExcitable, friendly, often happy, little dim, extreme love for food, and arguably quite gullibleStatusUnknownAge4Appearences and AbsencesEpisode count39 appearances (not includingSoother or Later'scredits) and 2 absencesInteractionsFriendsBeth,Bridgette,Cody,Duncan,Izzy,Jude,LeshawnaandNoah(best friend)FamilyMother(mentioned)Owenis one of the children attending the daycare center. Much like his teenage self, Owen is excitable, friendly, often happy, a little dim and has an extreme love of food. Being a child, he is arguably quite gullible, often falling for Duncan's tricks and willingly participating in his plans. Owen also has a very strong bond with his best friend Noah. In Venthalla, Owen wins an uber ball and shows it to his friends. Duncan urges him to play with it, to which Owen gives in, leading to the ball to rebound around the room causing destruction. It comes to the attention of Chef who confiscates it due to the 'no toys' rule at the daycare. Upset he lost the toy, Duncan then proposes the kids break into the safe where Chef is keeping all of the kids' toys. Navigating through the vents, the kids take back all their toys, except for Duncan who actually used this as a ploy to escape the daycare. Without Duncan and the map, the kids get lost in the vents, until Owen's sense of smell picks up the scent of food and is able to guide everyone back. Just as Noah, who had stayed behind to over for everyone, ran out of excuses, Owen and all the kids fall from the broken vent back into the classroom. Owen's uber ball plummets from the vent and now with an even greater elastic strength rebounds so hard it completely reduces the daycare to rubble.

Navigating through the vents, the kids take back all their toys, except for Duncan who actually used this as a ploy to escape the daycare. Without Duncan and the map, the kids get lost in the vents, until Owen's sense of smell picks up the scent of food and is able to guide everyone back. Just as Noah, who had stayed behind to over for everyone, ran out of excuses, Owen and all the kids fall from the broken vent back into the classroom. Owen's uber ball plummets from the vent and now with an even greater elastic strength rebounds so hard it completely reduces the daycare to rubble.

characters.name: Sugar
characters.description: SugarCharacter ProfileGenderFemaleHair colorBlondeEye colorBlueEpisode count17Additional InformationInteractionsFriendsBeth,Cody,Courtney,Duncan,Gwen,Harold,Izzy,Jude,Lightning,Noah,OwenEnemiesLeshawnaVoiced byRochelle Wilson Sugaris one of the children attendingHappy Tots Daycare Centre, starting inSugar & Spice & Lightning & Frights. Most of Sugar's traits from the original series are retained inTotal DramaRama. A country girl who had competed in several pageants in the past as well in a commercial, Sugar thinks highly of herself and is rather competitive, always seeing herself as number one. When things don't go her way, she easily becomes aggressive. And Because Had Autism Has And She Wears Huggies Pull Ups 3t-4t With Easy Open Sides As
